title: Connection reset by peer when connecting to published port
body:
### Issue Description

Seeing `Connection reset by peer` when trying to connect to application inside container.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1.
2.
3.


### Describe the results you received

```
$curl http://127.0.0.1:8080/liveness
curl: (56) Recv failure: Connection reset by peer

$ ss -tlpn '( sport = :8080 )'
State             Recv-Q            Send-Q                       Local Address:Port                         Peer Address:Port            Process
LISTEN            0                 4096                             127.0.0.1:8080                              0.0.0.0:*                users:(("rootlessport",pid=48154,fd=11))

$ podman exec -ti 3171005acd7e /bin/ash -c 'wget -qO- http://127.0.0.1:8080/liveness'
OK
```

### Describe the results you expected

I expected the published port to be routed to my application and return `OK` as it does inside the container.

### podman info output

### Privileged Or Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

```
$ rpm -q podman
podman-4.6.1-1.fc38.x86_64
```

### Additional information

Freshly installed system.
